product: Edits to resources in the UI now automatically update YAML
tagline: Edits to jobs and pipeline settings in the UI now automatically update YAML.
what_it_does: Edits to jobs and pipeline settings in the UI now automatically update YAML. Declarative Automation Bundles can be created and modified directly in the workspace. For requirements for using bundles in the workspace, see Declarative Automation Bundles in the workspace requirements.
why_it_matters: Reduces operational overhead and unlocks new capabilities for data teams on Databricks.
plain_summary: Edits to jobs and pipeline settings in the UI now automatically update YAML. Declarative Automation Bundles can be created and modified directly in the workspace.

capabilities.title: notebook: path: ../testpipeline.ipynb serverless: true
capabilities.desc: notebook: path: ../testpipeline.ipynb serverless: true catalog: main target: testpipeline${bundle.environment}

capabilities.title: glob: include: transformations/ serverless: true
capabilities.desc: glob: include: transformations/ serverless: true catalog: main schema: ${workspace.currentuser.shortname} rootpath: .

key_takeaway: Edits to jobs and pipeline settings in the UI now automatically update YAML.
